name: com.unity.xr.openxr
description: OpenXR is an open, royalty-free standard developed by Khronos that aims to simplify AR/VR development by allowing developers to target a wide range of AR/VR devices. Use this plug-in to enable OpenXR in XR Plug-in Management.

samples.description: Basic sample showing how to create and reference OpenXR action maps with the new input system.
Basic sample showing how to query OpenXR input with the XR Input APIs.
Shows a teapot mesh generated from native mesh subsystem with physics baked in background.
Demonstrates how to intercept an OpenXR method.
Demonstrates how to add support for a custom composition layer type.
Build a low-level XR functional test suite using the Mock OpenXR Environment test tools.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

* Added the Enable System Keyboard setting to the Meta Quest Feature configuration under Manifest Settings. ([UUM-135656](https://issuetracker.unity3d.com/product/unity/issues/guid/UUM-135656))
* Added `XrStructureType.EventDataGlobalDimmingLevelChangedAndroid` to support the `XR_ANDROID_global_passthrough_dimming` extension.
* Added analytics to track active build target when reported in Editor.

### Changed
* Set `Use OpenXR Predicted Time` to `true` by default.
* Changed the default `Foveated Rendering Method` to the SRP API.

### Fixed

* Fixed an issue in Enabled Interaction Profile where "+" is active even if there are no available build profiles left.
* Fixed issue with an empty visible mesh. ([UUM-135831](https://issuetracker.unity3d.com/product/unity/issues/guid/UUM-135831))
* Fixed Help Box in OpenXR settings to comply with U6.5 designs
* Fixed Mono-API deprecation warning for AppDomain calls by using [OnCodeUnloading] for domain exception handling on Unity 6000.5+
* Fixed compilation errors when OpenXR was present in Unity projects targeting non-XR supported platforms.
* Fixed a problem with feature settings window so that it is no longer cleared after a domain reload.
* Fixed a problem with feature validation so that all features are refreshed when we first gather validation rules.
* Fixed a problem with OpenXR API Layers so that we now set the correct path when running on Windows Standalone build.
